allow: PowerShell($paths = @\("$env:ProgramFiles\\nodejs\\node.exe", "${env:ProgramFiles\(x86\)}\\nodejs\\node.exe", "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\nodejs\\node.exe", "$env:APPDATA\\npm\\node.exe", "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Microsoft\\WinGet\\Links\\node.exe"\); foreach \($p in $paths\) { if \(Test-Path $p\) { Write-Output "FOUND: $p"; & $p --version } }; Write-Output "---"; Get-ChildItem -Path "$env:ProgramFiles","$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs" -Filter "node.exe" -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue -Depth 3 | Select-Object FullName)
